StringData.String: Wage war against powerful foes to vanquish evil and earn legendary rewards!
Earn more powerful equipment by eliminating the boss more quickly! Finish the battle in the fastest time to get the best loot.
Defeat enemy camps quickly to earn platinum loot!
Raspin is back for revenge. His defeat at your hands has angered him fiercely. He has banded together with several other robber clans and has come to your castle to claim it... and your life.
The dwarves of Orzammar Thaig have begun to reclaim Davroken Thaig, but discovered that a nest of spiders there. It will take a mighty feat to drive out the spiders and defeat their queen.
A high dragon has been spotted in the Vimmark Mountains with an army of darkspawn and dragonlings. You will need to enlist your friends to win this battle.
The possessed witch Soleil has vanished from her cell in the dungeons of Kaiten. It is said an army of darkspawn and demons protect her now in the deep swamps.
My castle is under siege! Raspin and his robber clans have come for revenge. Help me fend them off in Dragon Age Legends and you will share in the epic rewards!

We must help the dwarves reclaim Davroken Thaig! The spider queen Carthriss has taken over with her hordes of spiderlings. Help me oust them in Dragon Age Legends and you will share in the epic rewards!

A High Dragon has been spotted on a ridge in the Vimmark Mountains! An army of darkspawn and dragonlings stand between us and victory. Join my battle in Dragon Age Legends and you will share in the epic rewards!
Soleil has escaped Kaiten! She is marshalling a horde of demons and darkspawn in the swamps. Join my battle in Dragon Age Legends and you will share in the epic rewards!
Click on a raid button above to use this slot.
Check out a matching weapon in the store!
Your level is too low to see this weapon.
Fight the raid boss before time runs out to complete the raid and get your loot.
The more enemy camps you defeat in a row, the greater the progress!
{%mercAmount%} camps will be defeated by the mercenaries and added to your raid contribution.
You can ask your friends to help you fight this battle
Possible Raid Boss Loot for {%tierType%} Tier:
Best Possible Loot in Current Tier:
You have failed to defeat {%bossName%} in time.
You have earned {%count%} out of {%total%} loot.
Are you sure you want to quit this Raid? All progress will be lost.
You cannot quit a Raid you initiated as others are participating.
You have run out of battle slots.
You ran out of time in {%raidName%}'s Raid. Are you up for a re-match?
Having defeated the scouts, you can see a guard tower up ahead. Continue on to the guard tower or retreat? (The next encounter is worth 2 camps and has increased rewards)
The guards have been defeated but there are several other bandits advancing. Fight off the assailants or retreat? (The next encounter is worth 3 camps and has increased rewards)
There is a group of bandits guarding the leader's tent. Continue forward or retreat? (The next encounter is worth 4 camps and has increased rewards)
The leader of this band has come out of his tent with his guards. Battle the leader or retreat? (The next encounter is worth 5 camps and has increased rewards)
You've defeated this band of brigands, but the leader has escaped to another camp! Continue onward to next camp or retreat? (The next encounter is worth 1 camp)
The boss encounter has unlocked. Continue on to battle the boss or retreat?
These hatchlings are only the beginning, there is another group closer to the nest! Continue onward or retreat? (The next encounter is worth 2 camps and has increased rewards)
An ambush! Fight them off or retreat? (The next encounter is worth 3 camps and has increased rewards)
There is a large cluster of eggs here at the center of the thaig. Continue forward or retreat? (The next encounter is worth 4 camps and has increased rewards)
You've found a huge nest of spiders near the river. Destroy the nest or retreat? (The next encounter is worth 5 camps and has increased rewards)
This nest has been destroyed, but there are more nests to destroy before you can find the queen. Continue onward to next nest or retreat? (The next encounter is worth 1 camp)
The boss encounter has unlocked. Continue on to battle the boss or retreat?
Continue onward into the camp or retreat? (The next encounter is worth 2 camps and has increased rewards)
You are now deeper into the camp! Fight them off or retreat? (The next encounter is worth 3 camps and has increased rewards)
You are now deeper into the camp! Continue forward or retreat? (The next encounter is worth 4 camps and has increased rewards)
You are now in the heart of the drake camp! Destroy the nest or retreat? (The next encounter is worth 5 camps and has increased rewards)
Continue onward to next group or retreat? (The next encounter is worth 1 camp)
The boss encounter has unlocked. Continue on to battle the boss or retreat?
Continue onward or retreat? (The next encounter is worth 2 camps and has increased rewards)
Fight them off or retreat? (The next encounter is worth 3 camps and has increased rewards)
Continue forward or retreat? (The next encounter is worth 4 camps and has increased rewards)
Destroy the nest or retreat? (The next encounter is worth 5 camps and has increased rewards)
Continue onward to next group or retreat? (The next encounter is worth 1 camp)
The boss encounter has unlocked. Continue on to battle the boss or retreat?
The raid you are trying to join cannot be found.
The archetype of the raid you are trying to join cannot be found.
Cannot join raid; it is already full.
You have already joined this raid.
The raid you are trying to join is currently locked.
The raid you are trying to join has expired.
You currently do not have enough available raid slots for this raid.
You are too low of a level to join this raid.
